title: Mi ilustrísimo amigo
overview: The real, passionate, epistolary love affair between two of the most brilliant minds of 19th-century Spain: Emilia Pardo Bazán and Benito Pérez Galdós. A story of love, passion, and sex, ahead of its time.

trailers.title: ‘Mi ilustrísimo amigo’ se rueda en Gran Canaria sobre Galdós
